ideation: This animation sequence will depict the robot playfully interacting with the bright button emoji, 🔆.  The overall feeling should be one of cheerful curiosity and gentle interaction. We will use the right arm primarily, as the left arm will remain in a neutral position to balance the animation.  The movement will be a gentle reach and touch, followed by a slight pull or tug, and finally, a return to the neutral position. This will express a lighthearted engagement with the bright button. Frame 1 shows the robot's arm resting neutrally. Frame 2 initiates a gentle upward reach towards the button. Frame 3 shows the robot's hand making contact with the button. Frame 4 shows the button being gently pulled or tugged. Frame 5 shows the robot's arm returning to its neutral position.

frames.beat: arms rest neutrally, ready to engage
the right arm gently reaches upward
fingers curl around the bright button
a playful tug on the button
the arm returns to a relaxed neutral pose
